# The Odyssey

*Homer · 750 BCE · *Ὀδύσσεια**

Greek epic attributed to Homer (8th century BCE), in twenty-four books. It tells of [Odysseus](../characters/odysseus.md)'s return to Ithaca after the Trojan War: ten years of wandering, trials and ruses, while his wife Penelope holds off the suitors. A foundational text of Western literature, it is the great poem of the voyage, of cunning and of homecoming.
